framework.name: AP2 Mandate Chain
framework.description: Three-layer cryptographic mandate system (Intent → Cart → Payment) using W3C Verifiable Credentials. Intent Mandate = pre-authorized spending authority with boundaries. Cart Mandate = deterministic lock on exact purchase. Payment Mandate = minimal credential for settlement. This IS a portable spending authority spec — not callback-based, not per-transaction human approval.
framework.raw_quote: For HNP scenarios, the Intent Mandate provides the agent with the authority to act within predefined boundaries. These are presented as an upfront agreement detailing the shopping intent and conditions.

source.title: What is the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) and How Does It Work?
